title: Day 01 Resources
description: Official documentation and references for today's topics. Prefer these over random blog posts.

resources.title: React — Quick Start
resources.description: Official React docs. Read 'Your First Component' and 'Writing Markup with JSX' after today's lesson.

resources.title: React — Describing the UI
resources.description: Deep dive on components, JSX, and passing props — aligns with today's component work.

resources.title: Vite — Getting Started
resources.description: How Vite dev server, HMR, and production build work. Skim the 'Why Vite' section.

resources.title: Vite — Features
resources.description: HMR, TypeScript support, and build optimizations — useful when interviewers ask why Vite.

resources.title: TypeScript — Everyday Types
resources.description: Covers string, number, boolean, arrays, and type inference — matches today's TypeScript section.

resources.title: TypeScript — React Cheatsheet (React TypeScript Cheatsheet)
resources.description: Practical examples for typing React components and props. Bookmark for the whole track.

resources.title: MDN — JavaScript Modules
resources.description: import/export fundamentals that underpin every React file.

resources.title: React Developer Tools
resources.description: Install the browser extension today. You will use it for the rest of the track.
